name: keychain-addon-builder
description: Builds keychain.node — the N-API addon exposing the shared keystore-infra core (macOS Keychain + Secure-Enclave biometric ACL) to regular Node consumers. Republished by socket-addon as @socketaddon/keychain-*. Direct-clang link of an N-API shim + keystore-infra; no node-gyp.
